title: Snowy Expansion
description: New colors for snowy biomes, new trees, structures and mob variants
body:
![Snowy expansion banner1](https://i.imgur.com/cToziMy.png)
![New snowy colors](https://i.imgur.com/ZbPNpEZ.png)
![New mobs variants](https://i.imgur.com/qJhuWQW.png)

This is a datapack/mod that adds a lot of fun to the snowy biomes, forgoten in the last update.

## What does Snowy expansion brings?

- New colors for grass, sky and water in biomes: Snowy taiga, snowy beach, snowy plains, snowy sloopes
- New trees in snowy biomes.
- 4 new structures, 3 natural, and 1 pillager outpost
- New variants with required texture pack (**_NEEDS OPTIFIME OR CEM MODS LIKE [ETF] Entity Texture Features_**)
- Snowy giant creeper, with different loot.
- Giant wolf x2 size spawn near new rocks structures.
